calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Vacated

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar because a dismissal was filed. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KASEY J. CURTIS, TEL. NO. (213) 457-8089 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted as to both causes of action alleged by plaintiff with fifteen days leave to amend. Plaintiff is granted leave to allege, if he can do so in good faith, ultimate facts supporting one or more claims that are not preempted by the FCRA. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2012 Set For Trial On May-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
